source: SYN_POJ September STR — Draft agenda, sittings of 14–17/09/2026, approved by the Conference of Presidents (published 15/07/2026). Committee shown is the lead committee; codes 'OJ-2026-09-…' are placeholders for files not yet carrying a numbered report (shown as 'A10-/' in the draft agenda) and are replaced by the real code once sync-agenda resolves it.
